name: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band
description: The Beatles' landmark 1967 album and one of the most iconic record sleeves in popular music.

name: Abbey Road
description: The Beatles' 1969 album with one of the most recognisable covers ever printed.

name: Let It Be
description: The Beatles' 1970 album, presented here with the classic album cover file from Commons.

name: Making Movies
description: Dire Straits' 1980 album, shown with the sleeve artwork file from Wikimedia Commons.

name: The Dark Side of the Moon
description: A landmark 1973 album with one of the most recognisable sleeves in rock.

name: Led Zeppelin IV
description: A 1971 rock record with a famously stark, memorable cover.

name: Rumours
description: Fleetwood Mac’s 1977 classic, represented here with a square promotional image linked to the album.

name: The Wall
description: Pink Floyd’s 1979 double album with a simple, square cover that works really well in a grid.

name: Tubular Bells
description: Mike Oldfield’s 1973 debut album, a landmark progressive rock instrumental work and the first release on Virgin Records.
